It is the only vineyard in the USA dedicated exclusively to producing dry Provence-style Ros\u00E9 wines, all from estate-grown fruit. The vineyards are managed and all viticulture efforts are dedicated to making crisp, fruity, fun to drink Ros\u00E9 wines. \"Ros\u00E9 on Purpose!\".

name: The Vineyard at East Wind
description: If you have always dreamed of a wedding among the vines, East Wind is delighted to introduce our newest wedding destination. A Secluded, Romantic Long Island Wedding Venue, For those who have always envisioned a wedding surrounded by lush vineyards, The Vineyard at East Wind is your dream come true. This enchanting new destination offers the perfect romantic setting for an intimate celebration with your closest family and friends. From the ceremony to the farewell, your vineyard wedding will feature breathtaking scenery, farm-to-table cuisine, exceptional service, and much more.

name: HayLoft In The Grove
description: HayLoft in the Grove is a rustic and chic wedding venue and event space just outside of the quaint Village of East Aurora, New York. It is the perfect venue for those who want to kick back and have a relaxing and one-of-a-kind experience on our stunning 100 acres.

name: Pellegrini Vineyards
description: Just 85 miles from New York City and situated in the heart of the North Fork wine region, Pellegrini Vineyards provides the perfect setting for your special day. In fact for over 20 years we have created wedding memories to stand the test of time. Imagine a picturesque ceremony amongst the lush, verdant vines. Your nuptials will be the toast of the town as your loved ones witness your special moment in the vineyard. The tasting room and courtyard provide old world ambiance, the perfect backdrop for dinner and dancing. You will have the vineyard entirely to yourself and your guests will remember your wedding for years to come!

    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)

name: Bat Haus
description:
Bat Haus is a Brooklyn event space rental in Williamsburg for weddings, 
private events, and corporate offsites. Host up to 50 guests with flexible 
layouts, rare backyard access, wooden tables, and curated packages.

name: Notting Hill Farm
description:
Notting Hill Farm is a rustic yet luxury wedding and event barn venue with 
modern amenities located on a 215-acre private farm estate 35 minutes 
outside of Buffalo, NY and only 15 minutes from East Aurora. We offer 
privacy and seclusion with a million-dollar view, indoor/outdoor 
experiences, luxury wedding services, and upscale amenities. Contact us 
today for more information or a tour!

name: Cityview Rooftop Event Space & Lounge
description: Host your wedding or event at our rooftop space with fine food & drinks. Contact us to plan your unforgettable experience!

      function bgImgLoaded() {
        if (!globals.headerBgImgLoaded) {
          globals.headerBgImgLoaded = new Date().getTime();
        } else {
          globals.headerBgImgLoaded();
        }
      }
      if (imageUrl) {
        const img = new Image();
        img.src = imageUrl;
        img.onload = bgImgLoaded;
        globals.headerBgImgExists = true;
      } else {
        globals.headerBgImgExists = false;
      }
